title: F12 $select-projected BBL decimal serialization
capture_method: live curl GET by M1-T002 producer, tokenless, single KB-scale request (polite shared-pool use)
notes: Socrata number-typed BBL serializes as e.g. "1000010010.00000000". Connector MUST normalize to the 10-digit canonical string while preserving the raw value in provenance (M1-T001 G1 finding C6).
